description: Abstract guidance tones for CairnCode. These encode structural cues like bracket ladders, indent guides, and whitespace hints before any platform mapping.

guide.description: Quiet structural rail for indent guides and low-priority whitespace hints.

guideActive.description: Raised structural rail for the currently active indent band.

whitespace.description: Dormant whitespace cue that should stay aligned with the quiet guide rail.

bracketWarm.description: Primary warm bracket rung tied to the live accent band.

bracketBright.description: Secondary bright bracket rung that adds dry contrast without stealing focus.

bracketCool.description: Cool or vegetal bracket rung that keeps nested structure distinct from warm emphasis.

bracketMatchFill.description: Soft bracket-match wash built from the primary bracket rung.

bracketMatchStroke.description: Bracket-match stroke emphasis built from the same warm rung with a stronger edge.

guideInk.description: Readable guidance ink for the active line number and focused scaffold labels.
